i made an ellernate pov!! check it out!!

Intro: The considerably big bedroom was dimly lit by some candles. Not because there wasn't electricity, but because the candles set a somewhat romantic atmosphere. Ellernate sat upon iTrapped's bed, watching the latter apply some new lipstick.

"... When are you gonna finish?" He complained. He wanted some quality time with iTrapped since iTrapped had finally gotten a moment away from Chance. "I'm getting impatient, Isaac."

He watched iTrapped turn around and walk over to him. Before he could react, the man had taken hold of his cheeks; and planted a kiss on one of them. It left a light blue stain behind. He sat there, stunned, as iTrapped grimaced and tried another lipstick. Then planted another kiss on his untouched cheek. Then tried another lipstick, and repeated the action. Ellernate barely had time to register that iTrapped was checking if the lipsticks were stain proof, before iTrapped planted another kiss on his face.

"W-what... what are you doing?"
